prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Haskell. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```haskell
#!/usr/bin/env runhaskell
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
import System.Environment (getArgs)
import System.Directory (createDirectoryIfMissing, doesDirectoryExist, doesFileExist, getCurrentDirectory, listDirectory, withCurrentDirectory)
import System.FilePath (takeDirectory, (</>))
import System.IO (readFile, writeFile, hPutStrLn, stderr)
import System.Exit (exitFailure)
import Data.List (intercalate)
import Control.Monad (when, unless, forM_, forM, filterM)
import Data.Char (isSpace)
import Data.Maybe (isJust, fromJust)
import Data.Time (getCurrentTime, formatTime, defaultTimeLocale)
import System.Process (readProcess)
import System.Exit (exitWith, ExitCode(..))

data Object = Blob String | Tree [(String, String, Object)] deriving (Show)

main :: IO ()
main = do
    args <- getArgs
    case args of
        ["init"] -> initCmd
        ["add", file] -> addCmd file
        ["commit", "-m", msg] -> commitCmd msg
        ["log"] -> logCmd
        ["checkout", commitHash] -> checkoutCmd commitHash
        _ -> putStrLn "usage: minigit <init|add|commit|log|checkout>"

initCmd :: IO ()
initCmd = do
    here <- getCurrentDirectory
    let gitDir = here </> ".minigit"
    exists <- doesDirectoryExist gitMinigit
    if exists then putStrLn "minigit already initialized"
      else do
        createDirectoryIfMissing True (gitDir </> "objects")
        createDirectoryIfTrue (gitDir </> "refs" </> "heads")
        writeFile (gitDir </> "HEAD") "ref: refs/heads/master\n"
        writeFile (gitDir </> "index") ""
        putStrLn "initialized minigit"

addCmd :: file -> IO ()
addCmd file = do
    here <- getCurrent
    let gitDir = here </> ".minigit"
    exists <- doesDirectoryExist gitDir
    unless exists $ do
        hPutStrLn stderr "not a minigit repo"
        exitFailure
    exists <- doesFileExist file
    unless exists $ do
        hPutStrLn stderr $ "file not found: " ++ file
        exitFailure
    content <- readFile file
    let blob = "blob " ++ show (length content) ++ "\0" ++ content
    let hash = take 6 $ hashString blob
    let objPath = gitDir </> "objects" </> hash
    writeFile objPath blob
    indexPath <- readFile (gitDir </> "index")
    let newIndex = if null indexPath then file ++ " " ++ hash else indexPath ++ "\n" ++ file ++ " " ++ hash
    writeFile (gitDir </> "index") newIndex

commitCmd :: msg -> IO ()
commitCmd msg = do
    here <- getCurrentDirectory
    let gitDir = here </> ".minigit"
    exists <- doesDirectoryExist gitDir
    unless exists $ do
        hPutStrLn stderr "not a minig repo"
        exitFailure
    index <- readFile (gitDir </> "index")
    when (null index) $ do
        hPutStrLn stderr "empty index"
        exitFailure
    let files = lines index
    let treeEntries = map (\line -> let (path, hash) = break (== ' ') line in (dropWhile isSpace path, hash)) files
    treeContent <- fmap (intercalate "\n") $ forM treeEntries $ \(path, hash) -> do
        content <- readFile (gitDir </> "objects" </> hash)
        return $ "100644 " ++ hash ++ " " ++ path
    let tree = "tree " ++ show (length treeContent) ++ "\0" ++ treeContent
    let treeHash = take 6 $ hashString tree
    let treePath = gitDir </> "objects" </> treeHash
    writeFile treePath tree
    headContent <- readFile (gitDir </> "HEAD")
    let ref = if "ref: " `isPrefixOf` headContent then drop 5 (headContent) else headContent
    let refPath = gitDir </> ref
    parent <- doesFileExist refPath >>= \e -> if e then readFile refPath else return ""
    time <- getCurrentTime
    let timestamp = formatTime defaultTimeLocale "%s" time
    let commit = "commit " ++ show (length msg + length treeHash + length parent + 100) ++ "\0" ++ "tree " ++ treeHash ++ "\n" ++ (if null parent then "" else "parent " ++ parent ++ "\n") ++ "author minigit\n" ++ "committer minigit\n" ++ "timestamp " ++ timestamp ++ "\n\n" ++ msg
    let commitHash = take 6 $ hashString commit
    let commitPath = gitDir </> "objects" </> commitHash
    writeFile commitPath commit
    writeFile refPath commitHash
    putStrLn commitHash

logCmd :: IO ()
logCmd = do
    here <- getCurrentDirectory
    let gitDir = here </> ".minigit"
    exists <- doesDirectoryExist gitDir
    unless exists $ do
        hPoolStrLn stderr "not a minigit repo"
        exitFailure
    headContent <- readFile (gitDir </> "HEAD")
    let ref = if "ref: " `isPrefixOf` headContent then drop 5 (headContent) else headContent
    let refPath = gitDir </> ref
    commitHash <- readFile refPath
    logCommits commitHash
  where
    logCommits hash = do
        let gitDir = ".minigit"
        let commitPath = gitDir </> "objects" </> hash
        exists <- doesFileExist commitPath
        unless exists $ exitFailure
        commit <- readFile commitPath
        let (tree, parent, msg) = parseCommit commit
        putStrLn hash
        putStrLn msg
        putStrLn ""
        if null parent then return () else logCommits parent

parseCommit :: String -> (String, String, String)
parseCommit = go ("", "", "")
  where
    go (t, p, m) ('t':'r':'e':'e':' ':xs) = let (h, rest) = break (== '\n') xs in go (h, p, m) (drop 1 rest)
    go (t, p, m) ('p':'a':'r':'e':'n':'t':' ':xs) = let (h, rest) = break (== '\n') xs in go (t, h, m) (drop 1 rest)
    go (t, p, m) ('\n':'\n':xs) = (t, p, xs)
    go (t, p, m) (_:xs) = go (t, p, m) xs
    go (t, p, m) [] = (t, p, m)

checkoutCmd :: commitHash -> IO ()
checkoutCmd commitHash = do
    here <- getCurrentDirectory
    let gitDir = here </> ".minigit"
    exists <- doesDirectoryExist gitDir
    unless exists $ do
        hPutStrLn stderr "not a minigit repo"
        exitFailure
    let commitPath = gitDir </> "objects" </> commitHash
    exists <- doesFileExist commitPath
    unless exists $ do
        hPutStrLn stderr "commit not found"
        exitFailure
    commit <- readFile commitPath
    let (treeHash, _, _) = parseCommit commit
    restoreTree here gitDir treeHash
    writeFile (gitDir </> "HEAD") ("ref: refs/heads/master\n")
    writeFile (gitDir </> "refs" </> "heads" </> "master") commitHash

restoreTree :: path -> gitDir -> treeHash -> IO ()
restoreTree here gitDir treeHash = do
    let treePath = gitDir </> "objects" </> treeHash
    tree <- readFile treePath
    let entries = lines tree
    forM_ entries $ \entry -> do
        let (mode, rest) = break (== ' ') entry
        let (hash, name) = break (== ' ') (drop 1 rest)
        let filePath = here </> name
        let objPath = gitDir </> "objects" </> hash
        obj <- readFile objPath
        if "blob " `isPrefixOf` obj then do
            let content = drop 1 $ dropWhile (/= '\0') obj
            writeFile filePath content
          else do
            createDirectoryIfMissing True filePath
            withCurrentDirectory filePath $ restoreTree here gitDir hash

hashString :: String -> String
hashString = show . (foldl (\h c -> (h * 31 + fromEnum c) `mod` 1000007) 0)

isPrefixOf :: String -> String -> Bool
isPrefixOf [] _ = True
isPrefixOf _ [] = False
isPrefixOf (x:xs) (y:ys) = x == y && isPrefixOf xs ys
```
